headline: Michael Burry Just Did Another 'Big Short' — As Historic Chip Stock Rally Finally Snaps
summary: Michael Burry disclosed January 2027 puts on SOXX struck at $330. The chip ETF snapped its longest-ever rally — and 7 constituents report earnings this week.

headline: NXP Announces Availability of Proxy Materials for the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders to Be Held on June 10, 2026
summary: EINDHOVEN, The Netherlands, April 27, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- NXP Semiconductors N.V. (NASDAQ: NXPI) will hold its annual meeting of shareholders on Wednesday, June 10, 2026 at 8:30 a.m. CET at the Company’s Headquarters, High Tech Campus 60, 5656 AG, Eindhoven, The Netherlands. NXP has filed its definitive proxy statement and annual report with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission and this proxy statement and other related meeting materials are also available at nxp.com/agm.
